AdvDescription:
Are you ready to take on the streets with the ultimate thrill machine? Look no further than this Ducati 848 Streetfighter, the embodiment of power and style in a compact package.

This 2013 Ducati 1100CC Streetfighter S is a true beast on the road.

The sleek black body of this sports bike exudes sophistication and attitude, making heads turn wherever you go. The 4 St DESMO 8V L/C engine delivers unmatched performance, while the 6-speed manual transmission ensures a smooth and exhilarating ride.

Priced at $11,990.00 AUD, this Ducati Streetfighter is a steal for any adrenaline junkie looking to upgrade their riding experience. Don't miss out on the opportunity to own a piece of motorcycle history.

Whether you're a seasoned rider or a beginner looking for a new challenge, the Ducati 848 Streetfighter is the perfect choice. Take control of the road and dominate every twist and turn with this high-performance machine.

Get behind the handlebars of this Ducati Streetfighter S MY12 and experience the thrill of a lifetime. Don't wait, make this beauty yours today and let the adventure begin.
ShortDescription: STREETFIGHTER 848 4 St DESMO 8V L/C 0.8L 6 SPEED MANUAL
